data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario behavior regarding group size changes after booking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific behavior. The linked use case discusses a booking transfer but does not include any details or evidence related to changes in group size. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to confirm or deny the expected outcome of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence of scenario behavior related to group size changes after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for group size change scenario
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the behavior of group size changes after booking.
